close_reason: Acknowledged: independent oracle pattern is correct, keep as-is
description: sign_verify_with_local_signing_backend signs with the adapter under test and verifies with ed25519-dalek's Verifier — an independent implementation. This satisfies the requirement that tests not use the code under test as its own oracle. Worth keeping exactly as-is; do not simplify to a round-trip through the same code path.
title: Integration test uses independent oracle correctly
